subject: Add Consul health check support for message-router
commit_message:
Add Consul health check support for message-router

This push adds health checks for the following message-router
components:  DMaaP, Kafka, and ZooKeeper.

Issue-ID: OOM-86

Change-Id: Icb557a27208eea94ea7ee6d8eadfb1f02481d7b4
Signed-off-by: gfraboni <gino.fraboni@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 2: Published edit on patch set 1.

Patch Set 2:

I'm not sure checking if the process is running means it's in a good shape. I would agree that it means it's at least running, but I'm not sure we can consider this a real helthcheck.
I don't have good knowledge of those components, so I cannot provide a good way to "healthcheck" them as of now, so let's consider this as a stepping stone towards healthcheck, but let's not consider this as done, if you agree. Thanks.

Patch Set 2:

> I'm not sure checking if the process is running means it's in a
 > good shape. I would agree that it means it's at least running, but
 > I'm not sure we can consider this a real helthcheck.
 > I don't have good knowledge of those components, so I cannot
 > provide a good way to "healthcheck" them as of now, so let's
 > consider this as a stepping stone towards healthcheck, but let's
 > not consider this as done, if you agree. Thanks.

That is exactly the approach we are taking.  Start by getting a minimal check in place - which in some instances is as basic as a process check - with the intent that we build on these checks going forward to develop much more robust health checks for all of the components.

Patch Set 2:

Cool, thanks for confirming.
Change has been successfully merged by Alexis de Talhouët
